meaning: vi.表现不佳,工作不如预期(或同行)vt.(股票等)运作差于(一般市场价格)
examples: So are mutual funds doomed to underperform?
Netflix was raised to "buy" from "underperform" at Bank of America Corp.
His recommendation is an understated "underperform" - Wall Street code for sell.
In a nutshell, actively-managed funds continue to underperform in almost all categories and closures remain high.
Another way by which teams underperform is that their managers can think too big.
